title: ComputerCraft med HelloWorld!
description: ComputerCraft with Hello World! A profit-free educational organization that provides free introductory classes to children and teens to spark their interest for the technological world.
body:
# Hello World! ComputerCraft Modpack

An educational modpack built around ComputerCraft and Hello World! — a non-profit initiative offering free tech education for children and teens. Designed to introduce programming and logical thinking through a creative and interactive Minecraft environment.

## **Key Features**

- 🖥️ **CC: Tweaked** – A modern extension of ComputerCraft for hands-on Lua programming directly in-game  
- 🧱 **WorldEdit** – Enables structured, command-driven building to teach logic, repetition, and efficiency  
- 🎮 **Custom Interface** – Streamlined main menu powered by PackMenu to reinforce an educational experience  
- ⚙️ **Optimized Performance** – Embeddium and Oculus deliver smoother gameplay and full shader compatibility  
- 🎓 **Focused Learning Environment** – Carefully selected mods to reduce distraction and encourage exploration through code

## Mods Included: 
- [CC: Tweaked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cc-tweaked)  
- [Placebo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/placebo)  
- [WorldEdit](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/worldedit)  
- [Oculus](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oculus)  
- [Embeddium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embeddium)  
- [PackMenu](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/packmenu)

## Visual Enhancements (Optional, not included) 

- [Sildur’s Shaders](https://sildurs-shaders.github.io/downloads/)  
- [Stay True (Texture Pack)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)

## Why Download?
This modpack provides a safe, distraction-free learning environment centered around logic, code, and creativity. Ideal for classrooms, clubs, or personal enrichment, it's a minimal yet powerful toolkit to introduce young minds to computing and problem-solving within a game they already love.
